seo.description: SpecOps — desktop workspace for specs, notes, and project files. Tauri + SvelteKit app with folder workspaces, markdown editing, and workspace-scoped AI agents.

props.title: SpecOps
paragraphs: SpecOps is a desktop workspace for specs, notes, and project files — built with Tauri and SvelteKit. Open folder-backed workspaces, edit markdown in a tabbed editor, and work with AI agents scoped to your project. AI support is under active development.
